case_title: LONNIE HOLMES VS. SAN FRANCISCO CITY AND COUNTY
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION (TRANSACTION ID # 74738531) FILED BY RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR NOV-07-2024 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-07-2024 HEARING RE: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The Giarratano declaration shows parties have not met and conferred, as required by CCP 430.41. Response now due December 9, 2024.
